name: C-16 compliance-add exits two when --why-authoritative-file is omitted and $EDITOR is unset
command: EDITOR= bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" https://x.com --id test --catalog cat.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -qE 'why_authoritative|EDITOR' err.txt && echo usage 1>&2
